title: cyclosorus pterosporus
intro: Cyclosorus pterosporus, also known as the Chinese fir-leaved fern, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Cyclosorus pterosporus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
